reviews.review_msg: I think I would eat rotten fruits and vegetables than be in this class. I have gained a new appreciation for my life after spending time in this lecture. However, she is a hilarious professor not because of her jokes but rather the way she talks and expects us not to fall asleep. One of the most passive aggressive profs ever. -Pyara G
DON'T Take her class pls!!!!!!

I felt like her teaching wasn't bad and she explained the topics pretty well but she was not accessible at all, don't reply to any email and same thing with the TAs. I had a question about the final and nobody answered me at all
Dont even bother just wait for Praise Ma's course. Test questions had maybe a 1-6 chance of being part of the homework that was assigned.
Don't bother taking this class wait for a semester when she isn't teaching it. Nothing she shows for practice or tutorial is resemblant of what is on the test
Curved the final so well she's a gem.

Wow. Just WOW. She is very impatient and doesn't show respect to others. She'll get mad at you for asking questions in class, claims she is never wrong, and threatens the class with "I don't have to be here you know" if she gets unhappy. No one finishes the exams on time and the exam average is just horrendous. Avoid at all costs!!!
Her exams are so difficult. If you get chance to take with another Proff , do it!!!

Basically tells you things will not be on the final exam, and then they are. Tells you not to study past the info on the slides, and the questions ask you things way beyond the slides. Class participation is a heavy part of the grade, but basically, it's attendance. Info posted on canvas is rarely info in lecture. Do alot of practice problems.

Susan teaching style is fast paced and her lecture notes do not reflect the long written questions you will be tested on. She expects you to know a lot about finance and the stock market and claims that knowledge is "bottom line" aka easy and self explanatory. She is consistently disorganized and  answers questions rudely. Practice the questions...

Most of the topics are fairly straighforward so she forces everyone to do practice problems for 3 hours which is a waste of time. 25% of grade is based on attendance/in-class assignments at the end of class so you're forced to go and stay. Literally called a student out for trying to leave early. Also never replies to emails
I enjoyed my time in her class. She would tell us what was important to study for the midterms and final exam. Her notes were sufficient, but if you want an A reading the textbook is required.
I read the reviews before taking this class and thought no way it can be that bad. I was wrong, DO NOT take this class with her.
I enjoyed taking 251 with her. I also found the coursework fairly easy.

I've seen happier people in prison and her included. Looks like she's doing this for free for how much she cares about questions and her lecture style. Never seen a more unenthusiastic or careless prof or teacher in my entire life. Looks like she just witnessed murder before this with that blank stare. Do yourself a favour and get out.

I thought she was a great prof. Her notes were detailed and enough to get by in her class. I used the textbook to get more insight into the more complex chapters. She would tell you what was important and what was not required to know. The work in 330 is not complicated but does require a lot of memorization for tax deductions and credits.

Don't ever take this class with her u wont be doing yourself a favor. She can't explain lectures well, and her grading is strict. On the final exam, she had to correct so many typos, just wasting our time.

Lectures frequently ended early, midterm average exactly 50% before scaling, said "thats not my fault", gave hints to what would be on exams, but was much more difficult than expected. Not helpful during office hours, syllabus wording required multiple instances of clarification, reads lecture slides for the first time. Avoid her like the plague.

Lectures were frequently cut short, tutorials were not well organized, and exam questions were often more difficult than the assigned homework. Material covered on the final was unclear. I found this course difficult, not because of the content itself, but how it was delivered.

Before taking 251 for A with Richard. That man was the best prof I met at SFU Beedie. Never thought this easier course could let her teach like that. I have seen the GOAT will start to teach 254 from next term, ready to retake and learn this course again.

This was my first accounting course at Beedie. She simply couldn't teach it. She didn't even know what she was talking about. It was simply incomprehensible. Please resign and don't impact the faculty's reputation.

Told us in lecture what would be on the final exam, then put the complete opposite it. Questions on the final were nothing like the homework. The average for the class was practically a failing mark. If you want to tank your gpa, I'd recommend taking this class with Susan.

Reasons to not take this class: 

- For our 10:30am lectures her office hours were 9:30am-10:30am however I would see her leave her car in the parking lot and walk straight to lecture

- During lectures Susan would “see this slide for the first time” meaning she wouldn't even know what she's teaching 

Catastrophic Prof
She is sucks at teaching.
DON'T TAKE ANY CLASSES WITH HER!!!!
If you failed, she will laugh and proud. If you passed, she will give as low as you can on your final letter grades.
If you want to fail, welcome to choose her course!
Her teaching skills are completely inadequate. There was no interaction at all with the students. If you happened to take her course, you can only hope for the pass.

We would ask our TA questions about the class and they would respond with I don't know because Susan doesn't tell me anything. Her final exam was genuinely so different from the homework, I saw questions that I had never seen before in the HW. Midterm class average was a 50%.
this professor put me back on antidepressants ONG DONT TAKE HER
she gets off on seeing students fail
if you know mean girls movie, lets just say add Susan to the cover of your burn book
if you're not religious pick a religion and pray

Take this class with any other professor. Her exams her impossible. Attendance for tutorials are worth 25% of your grade but they were pointless as you were split into groups every class to complete problems that no one knew how to do. The TA's did nothing in tutorials to help you learn. Susan is also very rude when students ask a question.
This class was extremely hard with Susan. Do not take it with her. I had never seen some of the questions she asked us to do on the final. rough class

Absolutely brutal. Every class felt like getting scolded for existing, she explains nothing, answers questions with a disgusting tone, sass, and condescending tude. Asking a question gets you a glare and a lecture about “figure it out yourself", and on the final she stopped taking questions midway bcuz she was tired of walking up the damn stairs😭

Susan couldn't teach a fish how to swim. She gets angry when you have a question and expects you to know everything. TA's are brutal and don't speak English. If you have to take this class with her, don't go to lecture, complete waste of time

I only selected the hilarious button because this course with Susan is laughable. You have to laugh, or else you will be crying like some people were when they handed in their final exam. Seriously, the worst exam I have ever taken at SFU. Hard class overall, but even harder with Susan. I wish anyone luck who enrolls in this class.
Don't even think about it. Don't take this class with her. Save your mental wellbeing. Please

Do not take this course with her. The final exam was impossible, and nothing like we had seen in class. The TAs are not helpful, and doing the homework doesn't really help you in the end. The tutorial exercises also don't help. Taking the class with Susan is not a good idea, select any other prof if you can.

Susan is hands down the worst professor I have ever had in my life. She is rude, condescending and passive-aggressive. She makes you feel you're stupid if you dont know how to do something. Her exams are NOTHING like the homework. Avoid this class with her at all costs. Her final exam is brutal, people walked out crying.
